notice: Preview data only. No email provider is connected and no runtime actions are executed.

lanes.label: Settings / Provider Gates
lanes.description: Policy, privacy, and provider gate placeholder.

home.title: Operations overview
home.summary: UI-003A shell skeleton showing cross-lane status without provider data or runtime actions.

secondary.title: Urgent inbox item placeholder
secondary.summary: Represents an item that could produce draft, task, or calendar proposals later.

secondary.title: Ibal next safe action placeholder
secondary.summary: Ibal can propose a plan but cannot execute external actions.

secondary.title: Recent receipt placeholder
secondary.summary: Receipts are first-class audit records, but no runtime receipt exists in UI-003A.

inbox.title: Email and message triage
inbox.summary: Inbox lane placeholder for accounts, smart views, thread list, selected thread, draft panel, and blocked egress gates.

secondary.title: Thread list placeholder
secondary.summary: Future slice will restore thread cards inside this lane.

secondary.title: Draft panel placeholder
secondary.summary: Draft creation remains a proposal path only.

secondary.title: Attachment/evidence placeholder
secondary.summary: No real message body or attachment is loaded.

calendar.title: Scheduling and time awareness
calendar.summary: Calendar lane placeholder for agenda, proposals, conflicts, reminders, event receipts, and source links.

secondary.title: Agenda placeholder
secondary.summary: Future slice can show day/week/month or agenda view.

secondary.title: Conflict placeholder
secondary.summary: Conflict detection cannot run without provider gates.

secondary.title: Source link placeholder
secondary.summary: Calendar proposals should link back to inbox threads and tasks.

tasks.title: Trackable work
tasks.summary: Tasks lane placeholder for status lanes, due dates, source references, linked inbox threads, and next safe action.

secondary.title: Task proposal placeholder
secondary.summary: Tasks may be proposed from inbox or calendar sources.

secondary.title: Status lane placeholder
secondary.summary: Future slice can show proposed, confirmed, blocked, and complete.

secondary.title: Next safe action placeholder
secondary.summary: Ibal may suggest next safe action without executing work.

automations.title: Safe workflow proposals
automations.summary: Automations lane placeholder for templates, triggers, approval gates, dry-run previews, receipts, and disabled/active state.

secondary.title: Trigger placeholder
secondary.summary: Triggers can be described but cannot execute.

secondary.title: Approval gate placeholder
secondary.summary: Automation must not bypass egress gatekeeper.

secondary.title: Receipt placeholder
secondary.summary: Any future enabled automation must produce receipts.

extensions.title: Providers, tools, and add-ons
extensions.summary: Extensions lane placeholder for email, calendar, task, GitHub/source, local server, permissions, and secret boundary state.

secondary.title: Email provider placeholder
secondary.summary: Gmail and other providers remain preview-only labels.

secondary.title: Calendar provider placeholder
secondary.summary: No calendar provider is connected.

secondary.title: Local cloud placeholder
secondary.summary: Local cloud/home server role is undecided by ARCH-004.

receipts.title: Audit trail
receipts.summary: Receipts lane placeholder for confirmed actions, proposals, drafts, gate changes, proof receipts, evidence, and blocked events.

secondary.title: Draft receipt placeholder
secondary.summary: Future draft creation should create receipts.

secondary.title: Gate change placeholder
secondary.summary: Provider and permission changes require audit records.

secondary.title: Export packet placeholder
secondary.summary: Export remains proposal-only until confirmed.

ibal.title: Conductor and orchestrator
ibal.summary: Ibal lane placeholder for priority stack, next safe actions, unresolved items, blockers, cross-lane synthesis, and proposed actions only.

secondary.title: Next safe action placeholder
secondary.summary: Ibal may suggest reviewing provider gates before any runtime proof.

secondary.title: Cross-lane summary placeholder
secondary.summary: Future slice can synthesize inbox, calendar, tasks, receipts, and blockers.

secondary.title: Action proposal placeholder
secondary.summary: Ibal proposals remain non-executing suggestions.

settings.title: Policies, privacy, and provider gates
settings.summary: Settings lane placeholder for account state, provider permissions, AI routing, data boundaries, draft-only egress, and receipts settings.

secondary.title: Provider permission placeholder
secondary.summary: No OAuth or provider secret exists in UI-003A.

secondary.title: AI routing placeholder
secondary.summary: Model routing remains planning-only.

secondary.title: Draft-only policy placeholder
secondary.summary: AI_ASSISTED_SEND remains false by default.

safetyStatements: No send, forward, delete, disclose, publish, deploy, provider, or repository mutation.
Direct framework export blocked by xi-io.net#239.

inspector.context: Selected lane context placeholder. UI-003A does not select real provider records.
inspector.evidence: Evidence placeholders reference preview fixtures only. No message body, attachment, provider record, or private data is loaded.
inspector.egressState: Draft-only mode is visible. Dangerous egress actions are disabled or absent.
inspector.ibalProposal: Ibal can propose next safe actions in the redesigned shell, but cannot execute actions in this preview.
inspector.receipts: Receipt lane is first-class. No runtime receipt exists until a future confirmed action creates one.

events.title: Urgent family transport thread
events.summary: Preview of a sensitive thread where Inbox would summarize context, identify next safe action, and keep external egress blocked by default.

evidence.finding: Thread reference placeholder only. No real message body loaded.

claims.caveat: Preview data only; no provider content inspected.

closureCriteria: No external message is sent by AI default.
Receipt is created for confirmed action.
events.downstreamAgentNote: Summarize the thread, propose a draft, and keep send blocked until explicit user action.
